comment: real-hardware reference values for the calibration CI: VimDrones Nano + AIR 2216 II 920KV with a 10x4.5 prop (Edu450, 3S). The 0.85+ levels sit on the firmware 8A current limiter. Model v2 matches the down-curve within ~21ms; the up_flat floor allows the model's faster up-steps - the bench PSU's CC foldback that stretched the real up-steps to 122ms+ is not modelled.
